reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para un café de media mañana, rico desayuno. La atención es fabulosa, las chicas son muy atentas y siempre pendiente de todo y de todos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place for a mid-morning coffee and a delicious breakfast. The service is fabulous; the staff are very attentive and always looking out for everyone.

reviews.comment:
Lugar agradable, si no me gusto que no se me informe sobre la avería del la grúa para realizar los cambios de aceite no funcionaban cuando saque con 2 días de anticipación el turno

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, but I didn't like that I wasn't informed about the breakdown of the crane for oil changes; they weren't working when I made the appointment two days in advance.
